ul.li: Initial State: Empty stack, lo is DOWN.
Veth Requirement: Host must create/move veth end.
Ordering: Loopback MUST be UP before IP assignment.
NAT: Requires IP Forwarding on Host.
Cleanup: Interfaces must be deleted or moved back to host.

g.title: Parent moved eth0 into namespace via IFLA_NET_NS_PID
Namespace local IP set on eth0
Parent moved eth0 into namespace via IFLA_NET_NS_PID
